title: Cursor Token Economy and Default Context Budget
summary: This Feature reduces default Cursor cache-read volume while preserving explicit access to canonical repo surfaces. It adds a root .cursorindexingignore, narrows selected Cursor rule globs, introduces lib/memory/handbook/context-economy.md with a routing entry in lib/memory/handbook/index.md, splits PRD orientation…
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
